_meta.method: curl wall-clock time, n=10 sequential trials per endpoint, --max-time 30
_meta.caveat: Wall-clock includes TLS handshake, DNS, network RTT from measurement machine. Server-side compute is a fraction of these numbers; for pure compute use the Docker container locally (see serving/README.md).
_meta.environment: Curl from local laptop (Pune, India); HF Space hosted in EU/US per HF default routing. Network adds ~700ms RTT.

cold_start.note: Space was warm (keepwarm cron hit recently). Cold-start measurement requires a 10-min idle period; quoted 2.7s figure in serving/README.md is from prior dress rehearsal.
